DEPT#1,RICHARD WISE,JUDGE PROTEM;PDOWLING,CSR;EESTACIO,CLERK C/C FOR SETT CONF. PLTF MARIA MOGYOROSSY APPEARING WITH CNSL DAVID MENDEZ. DEFT PATRICK HEAD APPEARING WITH CNSL. LORI T. WALLERSTEIN. CASE SETTLED BUT TO REMAIN ON J.T. CAL UNTIL STIP IS SIGNED & FILED WITH THE COURT. DEFT LEFT THE COURT BEFORE THE SETT WAS READ ON THE RECORD.
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER, CALENDAR OF NOV-10-1997, OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR, CASE SETTLED PER CLERK'S MINUTES IN FILE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEAD, PATRICK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1429 RHODE ISLAND ST, S.F., STAYED UNTIL DEC-05-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO CLAIM POSSESSION. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS & ATTY FEES. MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS INCLUDING 1542CC. PLTF RETAINS SECURITY DEPOSIT. UPON REQUEST PLTF TO PROVIDE NEUTRAL REFERENCE. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
